piv

This module defines the datum.piv.Piv base class, encapsulating BeVERLI stereo PIV data.

The datum.piv.Piv class provides methods for importing, exporting data, and run a pre-processing routine and extract profile data from the BeVERLI stereo PIV data.

class datum.piv.Piv(data=None, transformation_parameters=None)

This class defines Piv objects, designed to encapsulate BeVERLI stereo PIV data. It offers functions to import, export, and perform other simple operations.

Variables:

_data – Nested dictionary containing the BeVERLI stereo PIV data.

__init__(data=None, transformation_parameters=None)

Initialize a new instance of the ‘Piv’ class.

property data: Dict[str, Dict[str, ndarray | Dict[str, ndarray]]]

Access the current PIV data.

Returns:

The current PIV data.

property transformation_parameters

Getter for transformation parameters :return: current transformation parameters

has_quantity(data_type)

Check if a flow quantity is available in the BeVERLI stereo PIV data.

Parameters:

data_type (str) – String specifying the quantity to search.

Return type:

bool

Returns:

Boolean indicating whether the specified quantity was found.

preprocess_data()

Execute a comprehensive preprocessing routine in one go.
